docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNG, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, WAYLON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUNG, KENNETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YEE, WAYLON PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUBSTANTIATE DAMAGES SOUGHT BY ESTIMATE WORK AGREEMENT, INVOICE OR OTHERWISE. LICENSE EXPIRATION WAS ALSO OF CONCERN BECAUSE LICENSE NUMBER WAS ON THE BUSINESS CARD, PROVIDED TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY JUNG, KENNETH YEE, WAYLON
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY JUNG, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, WAYLON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---DOROTHY WONG. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-01-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, WAYLON
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JUNG, KENNETH
